ValidationRule.description: Story must pass through Sent to QA before it can be sent to Prod
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Sent to Prod"), ISCHANGED(Status__c), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Sent to QA"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Sent to UAT"), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Sent to Prod") ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Story must pass QA (Sent to QA / Sent to UAT) before it can be Sent to Prod.
